abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化单元测试生成中的应用日益广泛。然而，目前尚不清楚这些测试是真正反映了对程序行为的深层推理，还是仅仅复现了训练过程中学到的表面模式。如果后者占主导地位，那么由LLM生成的测试可能表现出诸多缺陷，如覆盖率下降、回归问题未被发现以及潜在缺陷未能检测等。因此，理解LLM如何生成测试，以及这些测试在代码演化过程中的响应机制至关重要。本文提出了一项大规模的实证研究，系统考察了LLM在程序变更下的测试生成表现。我们采用一种自动化的突变驱动框架，分析了八种不同LLM在22,374个程序变体上对语义改变型变更（SAC）和语义保持型变更（SPC）的反应。实验结果表明，LLM在原始程序上表现良好：生成的测试套件可达到79%的行覆盖率和76%的分支覆盖率，且所有测试均通过。然而，随着程序的演化，性能显著下降。在SAC场景下，新生成测试的通过率降至66%，分支覆盖率下降至60%。超过99%的在修改后失败的SAC测试，在原始程序上执行修改区域时仍能通过，这表明这些测试仍与原始行为存在残余关联，而非真正适应更新后的语义。即使在SPC场景下——功能保持不变——性能同样下降：通过率降至79%，分支覆盖率降至69%。尽管SPC不改变程序语义，但其常引入较大的语法变化，导致生成的测试套件变得不稳定。模型倾向于生成更多新测试，同时丢弃大量原有测试，反映出其对词汇层面变化的敏感性，而非对真实语义影响的准确感知。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，当前基于LLM的测试生成严重依赖表面线索，在程序演化过程中难以维持有效的回归意识。

title: Integrating an Innovative Named Entity Recognition Algorithm Within Knowledge Engineering Frameworks
authors: Yan Li
publish: 2025 11th International Conference on Computer and Communications (ICCC)
abstract: This study developed a complete system based on the BERT model to be applied in programming courses of engineering and science at higher education institutions, thereby meeting and adapting to the growing demand for artificial intelligence literacy in the field of HE (Higher Education). Based on the traditional BERT model, this study proposed a new model innovated by named entity recognition. A major innovation of this study is that it independently constructed a question-and-answer dataset based on student learning data and conducted experiments and analysis on this self-built dataset, with results indicating that this model is more effective than classic models. Another significant innovation of this study is the development of a question-and-answer system based on both the teacher and the student sides, aimed at helping teachers and students further strengthen and understand common issues in programming learning. The new model, which combines innovations in named entity recognition technology, was experimented on and analyzed using the self-built question-and-answer dataset, showing that this model is more efficient than traditional models. In the case study comparison based on two universities, the system was confirmed to facilitate autonomous learning during the programming learning process and to infer personalized learning plans suitable for students based on learning paths. After the analysis of the experiment, a majority of the teachers and students agreed that this system could improve the efficiency of programming learning to some extent.
title_zh: 将创新的命名实体识别算法融入知识工程框架中
abstract_zh: 本研究基于BERT模型构建了一个完整的系统，旨在应用于高等教育机构中的工程与科学类编程课程，以满足并适应高等教育领域对人工智能素养日益增长的需求。在传统BERT模型的基础上，本研究提出了一种通过命名实体识别技术进行创新的新模型。本研究的一项重大创新在于，独立构建了基于学生学习数据的问答数据集，并在此自建数据集上进行了实验与分析，结果表明该模型相较于经典模型更具有效性。另一项重要创新是开发了面向教师与学生双端的问答系统，旨在帮助师生更好地强化和理解编程学习中的共性问题。该结合命名实体识别技术革新后的新型模型，通过自建问答数据集进行实验与分析，显示出其相比传统模型具有更高的效率。在两所大学的案例对比研究中，系统被证实能够促进编程学习过程中的自主学习，并能根据学习路径推断出适合学生的个性化学习方案。实验分析结果显示，多数教师与学生认为该系统在一定程度上提升了编程学习的效率。

title: A Review of Screenshot-to-Code Generation Systems
authors: Padamjit Sandhu, Pankaj Khurana, Jimmy Singla
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Communication, Computing and Electronics Systems (ICCCES)
abstract: The conversion of screenshots into source code is very important phase in the automation of user interface development. There are artificial-based tools which can understand images and further convert them into executable source code. These system's performance is further improved with the incorporation of generative artificial intelligence. These generative artificial intelligence-based systems achieve high accuracy in converting sketches into source code. Further these systems are helpful for developers, otherwise it was time consuming and costly to convert images into source code and developers often distracted from focusing on logic and functionality. This review paper presents the existing studies which generate source code from sketches using artificial intelligence and machine learning. In this paper, several studies are evaluated and compared based on different parameters. Their strengths and weaknesses are also discussed in this paper. This review paper will help the researchers and authors working in this area to further improve GUI design process and in development of more accurate systems.
title_zh: 截图生成代码系统综述
abstract_zh: 将截图转换为源代码是用户界面开发自动化过程中的一个重要阶段。目前存在一些基于人工智能的工具，能够理解图像并进一步将其转换为可执行的源代码。通过引入生成式人工智能技术，这些系统的表现得到了进一步提升。基于生成式人工智能的系统在将草图转换为源代码方面表现出较高的准确性。此外，这些系统有助于开发者，否则将图像转换为源代码既耗时又昂贵，且开发者常常因此分心，无法专注于逻辑和功能设计。本文综述了现有利用人工智能与机器学习从草图生成源代码的研究工作。论文对多项研究进行了评估与比较，并从不同参数角度分析了它们的优势与不足。本综述论文将有助于该领域的研究人员和作者进一步优化图形用户界面（GUI）设计流程，并推动更精准系统的开发。

title: Security Integration and Risk Management in Modern DevOps: Tools, Frameworks, and Emerging Trends
authors: Manjula Sanjay Koti, Ankit Kumar, J Rajeshwari, S. Satheesh Kumar, Khalid Anjum, Gautam S Languti
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computational Innovations and Sustainable Technologies (ICCIST)
abstract: The emergence of DevOps has pushed teams to release updates more quickly than ever before, genuinely revolutionizing the speed of software delivery. Our study delves deeply into this important issue by examining how strong security measures, also known as DevSecOps, can be seamlessly integrated into DevOps procedures. We have combed through the most recent scholarly research to create a comprehensive picture of the frameworks, tools, and approaches that effectively integrate security into each stage of the software development process. Our analysis shows that there is an urgent need for automated security testing, cutting-edge risk models like the Preference Ranking Organization Method for Enrichment Evaluation (PROMETHEE), and cutting-edge solutions like blockchain to produce reliable audit trails. Future developments are probably going to concentrate on deeper governance integration, AIpowered threat intelligence, and the creation of standardized security maturity models for big businesses.
title_zh: 现代DevOps中的安全集成与风险管理：工具、框架及新兴趋势
abstract_zh: DevOps的兴起促使团队以前所未有的速度发布更新，真正革新了软件交付的速度。本研究深入探讨了这一重要议题，分析了如何将强有力的安全措施（即DevSecOps）无缝融入DevOps流程中。我们梳理了最新的学术研究成果，全面呈现了能够有效将安全集成到软件开发各个阶段的框架、工具和方法。我们的分析表明，迫切需要自动化安全测试、先进的风险评估模型（如偏好排序组织法—增强评价，PROMETHEE），以及区块链等前沿技术，以建立可靠的审计追踪机制。未来的发展趋势很可能聚焦于更深层次的治理整合、基于人工智能的威胁情报，以及为大型企业制定标准化的安全成熟度模型。

title: Design of Intelligent Report Automatic Generation System and Optimization of Generative Algorithm in Power Business Scenarios
authors: Li Chen, Hao Yang, Juntai Shi, Yixuan Chen, Xunquan Lu
publish: 2025 2nd International Seminar on Artificial Intelligence, Computer Technology and Control Engineering (ACTCE)
abstract: The digital transformation of power industry challenges the value mining of massive data, and the traditional report generation mode is inefficient and difficult to meet the professional and real-time requirements. In this paper, an intelligent automatic report generation system driven by business rules and optimized by generative algorithm is proposed to solve the problems of low efficiency, poor accuracy and poor readability of report generation in power scene. The system architecture is divided into a data fusion layer, a business rule layer, an intelligent generation layer, and an application interaction layer. A dynamic template engine is constructed through a knowledge graph, and combined with a rule engine and a domain fine tuned Large Language Model (LLM) to achieve automatic generation, verification, and optimization of reports. The experimental results show that the system can significantly improve the efficiency of report generation, reduce error rates, and support human-machine collaboration, providing an effective tool for the digital transformation of the power industry.
title_zh: 电力业务场景下智能报告自动生成系统设计与生成算法优化
abstract_zh: 电力行业数字化转型对海量数据的价值挖掘提出了新挑战，传统报表生成模式效率低下，难以满足专业性与实时性的要求。本文提出一种基于业务规则驱动、并由生成式算法优化的智能自动报表生成系统，以解决电力场景下报表生成效率低、准确率差、可读性弱等问题。该系统架构分为数据融合层、业务规则层、智能生成层和应用交互层。通过知识图谱构建动态模板引擎，并结合规则引擎与领域微调的大语言模型（LLM），实现报表的自动生成功能，支持生成结果的验证与优化。实验结果表明，该系统显著提升了报表生成效率，降低了出错率，支持人机协同，为电力行业的数字化转型提供了有效工具。

title: Evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection: An Empirical Study on Real-World Java Vulnerabilities_supp1-3676577.xlsx
authors: GABOR ANTAL

title: An Efficient Methodology to Develop Data Encryption Algorithms for IoT Networks
authors: Swapna Rani Thandra, M Rajendra Prasad, Maznu Shaik, K Rajasekhar, Pavan Kumar Tatavarathi
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computational Innovations and Sustainable Technologies (ICCIST)
abstract: Enhancement of data security in IoT networks by implementing cryptographic algorithms and functions to encrypt data transmitted by IoT systems over Wi-Fi networks is proposed. Since there is not much attention given to data security while using IoT, there are chances of data theft as hackers target the vulnerable devices and valuable data can be stolen. If plain text or strings are transmitted over IoT networks, it is easily identified by hackers. The goal is to address these challenges by implementing data encryption mechanisms for IoT networks and to protect sensitive data from unauthorized access by ensuring that intercepted data cannot be understood by potential attackers. The proposed methodology is to create a comprehensive encryption mechanism for safeguarding data stored in ESP8266 and transmitted over networks. The proposed approach has Caesar’s Cipher, and custom encryption (XOR) methods to ensure maximum data protection. Additionally, the mechanism will include encryption for string data received from a dedicated webpage, simulating real-life scenarios where users utilize a custom webpage to communicate with the ESP micro-controller. The primary purpose of this research is to develop a robust encryption solution that renders data incomprehensible to unauthorized users.
title_zh: 一种高效的方法来开发物联网网络的数据加密算法
abstract_zh: 提出通过在物联网（IoT）网络中实施加密算法和函数，对通过Wi-Fi网络传输的物联网系统数据进行加密，以增强数据安全性。由于在使用物联网时对数据安全的关注不足，黑客往往针对那些脆弱的设备，存在数据被盗的风险，有价值的数据可能被窃取。如果明文或字符串直接在物联网网络中传输，很容易被黑客识别。本研究旨在通过为物联网网络实施数据加密机制，解决上述挑战，确保被截获的数据无法被潜在攻击者理解，从而保护敏感数据免遭未经授权的访问。所提出的方案是为ESP8266中存储的数据及通过网络传输的数据建立一个全面的加密机制。该方法包括凯撒密码（Caesar’s Cipher）和自定义加密（XOR）技术，以实现最大程度的数据保护。此外，该机制还将对来自专用网页的字符串数据进行加密，模拟用户通过自定义网页与ESP微控制器通信的真实场景。本研究的主要目标是开发一种强大的加密解决方案，使数据对未经授权的用户完全不可读。

title: Iterative Floorplan Refinement for Efficient Area Utilization and Reduced Congestion in VLSI Physical Design
authors: P.Kishore, B.Haindavi, V.Priyanka
publish: 2025 IEEE 3rd Global Conference on Wireless Computing and Networking (GCWCN)
abstract: The rapid evolution of Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) technology has enabled the creation of complex chips and System-on-Chip (SoCs) by integrating billions of transistors within a single integrated circuit. The design of such advanced chips is a lengthy process that involves multiple stages, particularly in the domain of physical design. Physical design converts the Register Transfer Level (RTL) netlist into a manufacturable layout, commonly referred to as a GDS. It involves Floorplan, Powerplan, Placement, Clock tree synthesis, and Routing stages. Among them, floorplanning is a crucial phase, as it influences design performance and manufacturability by addressing congestion and area utilization. This paper focuses on a block-level implementation of an ORCATOP block using 32nm technology. It employs Synopsys’ IC Compiler II tool, using nine metal layers for routing and operating at a maximum frequency of 200 MHz. This study focuses on optimizing the design from the initial floorplan to various placement stages. Initially, the design exhibits severe congestion issues. Upon modifying the floorplan, significant improvements were achieved, particularly in congestion reduction. The results indicate that the iterative approach and a well-optimized floorplan highlight the significant reduction in congestion while achieving better utilization of the area by improving the overall design efficiency.
title_zh: 用于高效利用面积并减少VLSI物理设计中拥塞的迭代版图优化方法
abstract_zh:
超大规模集成电路（VLSI）技术的快速发展，使得在单个集成电路中集成数十亿个晶体管成为可能，从而实现了复杂芯片及系统级芯片（SoC）的制造。这类先进芯片的设计是一个耗时较长的过程，尤其在物理设计领域涉及多个阶段。物理设计将寄存器传输级（RTL）网表转换为可制造的版图，通常称为GDS。该过程包括布局规划（Floorplan）、电源规划（Powerplan）、单元放置（Placement）、时钟树综合（Clock Tree Synthesis）以及布线（Routing）等步骤。其中，布局规划是关键环节，因为它通过解决拥塞和面积利用率问题，直接影响设计的性能与可制造性。

本文针对采用32nm工艺节点的ORCATOP模块进行了块级实现研究，使用Synopsys IC Compiler II工具进行设计，采用九层金属布线，并在最高200 MHz的工作频率下运行。本研究重点优化从初始布局规划到多个放置阶段的设计流程。最初的设计存在严重的拥塞问题。通过调整布局规划方案后，取得了显著改进，尤其是在降低拥塞方面效果明显。结果表明，采用迭代优化方法并结合精心设计的布局规划，能够有效减少拥塞，同时提升面积利用率，从而全面提高设计效率。

title: Llm-Fuzz: Adaptive, Structure-Aware Fuzzing of Javascript Engines with Large Language Models
authors: Kongyang Liu, Chengxiang Tan
publish: 2025 11th International Conference on Computer and Communications (ICCC)
abstract: Fuzzing modern JavaScript (JS) engines remains challenging due to the semantic complexity required to explore deep program states and advanced components such as Just-InTime (JIT) compilers. Traditional mutation-based fuzzers often generate invalid inputs, while existing structure-aware techniques still face a semantic wall, producing syntactically valid but semantically flawed programs. This paper presents LLM-Fuzz, a coverage-guided fuzzing framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to perform AST-based, semantics-aware mutations. Unlike prior fuzzers with fixed operators, LLM-Fuzz introduces an adaptive feedback loop that fine-tunes the mutation strategy during fuzzing via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Experiments on V8 and ChakraCore show that LLM-Fuzz reduces runtime error rates and achieves higher edge coverage compared to state-of-the-art fuzzers. These results demonstrate that incampaign, LLM-driven adaptation can improve the effectiveness of fuzzing structured inputs.
title_zh: LLM-Fuzz：基于大语言模型的自适应、结构感知的JavaScript引擎模糊测试
abstract_zh: 现代 JavaScript（JS）引擎的模糊测试仍然面临挑战，原因在于探索深层程序状态以及高级组件（如即时编译器，JIT）所需的语义复杂性。传统的基于变异的模糊测试工具常常生成无效输入，而现有的结构感知技术仍存在语义瓶颈，生成的程序虽然语法正确，但语义上存在缺陷。本文提出 LLM-Fuzz，一种基于覆盖率引导的模糊测试框架，该框架利用大型语言模型（LLM）进行基于抽象语法树（AST）的、具备语义感知能力的变异操作。与以往采用固定变异算子的模糊测试工具不同，LLM-Fuzz 引入了一种自适应反馈机制，通过低秩适配（LoRA）在模糊测试过程中动态优化变异策略。在 V8 和 ChakraCore 上的实验表明，相较于当前最先进的模糊测试工具，LLM-Fuzz 能够显著降低运行时错误率，并实现更高的边覆盖度。这些结果表明，在实际应用中，基于大模型的自适应能力可以有效提升对结构化输入的模糊测试效果。

title: Research on Retrieval-Augmented Generation Method Based on Dynamic Knowledge Indexing and Semantic Alignment Optimization
authors: Yang Shao, Ziliang Du, Bo Liu, Hao Wen, Xilin Zhang, Chaofan Zhang
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Social Network Systems (AISNS)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face significant challenges in knowledge-intensive tasks, including knowledge solidification, insufficient timeliness, and hallucination generation. To address these challenges, this study proposes an innovative retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) method based on dynamic knowledge indexing and semantic alignment optimization. However, traditional RAG methods suffer from semantic fragmentation and query-knowledge misalignment. The approach constructs a dynamic multi-granularity knowledge indexing system and integrates an intelligent dual-path routing decision mechanism to achieve efficient collaboration between knowledge retrieval and generation processes. Key innovations include: (1) a dynamic multi-granularity (comprising lexical-level inverted indexing and semantic-level vector indexing) knowledge indexing architecture that employs an adaptive chunking algorithm based on semantic coherence analysis to resolve semantic fragmentation caused by fixed-length segmentation; (2) a prompt engineering-driven semantic alignment optimization mechanism that unifies the semantic space of queries and knowledge bases by generating hypothetical question-answer pairs, significantly improving retrieval accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate significant improvements: 37.01 EM and 47.53 F1 on HotpotQA, 35.12 EM and 45.69 F1 on SQuAD. This work provides a reliable technical solution for intelligent question answering and advances RAG technology in semantic understanding and retrieval accuracy.
title_zh: 基于动态知识索引与语义对齐优化的检索增强生成方法研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在知识密集型任务中面临诸多挑战，包括知识固化困难、时效性不足以及幻觉生成等问题。为应对这些挑战，本研究提出了一种基于动态知识索引与语义对齐优化的创新检索增强生成（RAG）方法。然而，传统RAG方法普遍存在语义碎片化和查询-知识错位的问题。本文所提方法构建了动态多粒度知识索引体系，并引入智能双路径路由决策机制，实现了知识检索与生成过程间的高效协同。主要创新点包括：（1）一种动态多粒度知识索引架构（包含词法级倒排索引与语义级向量索引），采用基于语义连贯性分析的自适应分块算法，有效解决了因固定长度切分导致的语义碎片化问题；（2）一种由提示工程驱动的语义对齐优化机制，通过生成假设性问答对统一查询与知识库的语义空间，显著提升了检索准确率。实验结果表明，该方法在HotpotQA数据集上达到37.01的EM值和47.53的F1值，在SQuAD数据集上达到35.12的EM值和45.69的F1值。本研究为智能问答系统提供了可靠的技术解决方案，推动了RAG技术在语义理解与检索精度方面的进步。

title: SecureCodeReviewer: An AI-Driven Automated Secure Code Review System with Context-Aware Vulnerability Detection
authors: Dhanush MC, Sandeep Kumar TV, Mohan Krishna G, Keerthika T
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Communication, Computing and Electronics Systems (ICCCES)
abstract: This survey examines the use of AI and machine learning in software vulnerability detection. As software becomes more advanced and complicated over the days cyber-attacks get more sophisticated and advanced, so this has become a problem, this survey examines deep learning methods like CNN, RNN & BiLSTMs, transformers like BERT and all its variations, it also examines graph-based methods like GGNNs and HAGNNs, and conventional ML methods. Key datasets include SARD, NVD, Debian Linus repositories, and Python-specific datasets have been used and examined for their advantages and disadvantages. By comparing performance metrics including accuracy, F1-score, recall, precision, and ROC, reliability is evaluated. To promote secure engineering methods, the study indicates future prospects for multimodal learning, cross-language transfer, federated learning, and integration with software pipelines. It also addresses long-standing challenges such as language reliance, dataset bias, scalability, and explainability.
title_zh: SecureCodeReviewer：一种基于人工智能的自动化安全代码审查系统，具备上下文感知的漏洞检测能力
abstract_zh: 本调查研究了人工智能与机器学习在软件漏洞检测中的应用。随着软件日益复杂和先进，网络攻击也变得愈发 sophisticated 和高级，这已成为一个严峻问题。本调查重点分析了深度学习方法，如卷积神经网络（CNN）、循环神经网络（RNN）及双向长短期记忆网络（BiLSTM），以及基于变换器的模型，如BERT及其各种变体；同时考察了图-based 方法，如图神经网络（GGNN）和层次化图神经网络（HAGNN），以及传统的机器学习方法。研究中使用并评估了多个关键数据集，包括SARD、NVD、Debian Linus代码仓库，以及针对Python语言的特定数据集，分析其各自的优缺点。通过对比准确率、F1分数、召回率、精确率和ROC等性能指标，对模型的可靠性进行了评估。为促进安全工程实践，该研究指出了未来的发展方向，包括多模态学习、跨语言迁移学习、联邦学习，以及与软件开发流程的集成。此外，研究还探讨了长期存在的挑战，如对编程语言的依赖性、数据集偏差、可扩展性以及模型可解释性等问题。

title: Design and Implementation of a Novel FPGA-based Secure Electronic Voting System using Fingerprint Authentication
authors: Y. Chalapathi Rao, Doti Giribabu, Harini Nallanagula, Bandla Soumya
publish: 2026 International Conference on AI-Driven Smart Systems and Ubiquitous Computing (ICAUC)
abstract: The design and implementation of hardware fingerprint based EVM on Zynq-7000 FPGA is presented. The objective of designing this system is to provide security and transparency in the process of voting with fast and reliable operation. As we know, there are many EVMs in the market, but the authentication is manual or not very stringent. This causes several issues like multiple and illegal voting. To address this problem, we implemented biometric authentication on the FPGA device. The FPGA’s Block RAM saves the fingerprint data as .mem files after conversion into binary bitstreams. This allows for on-chip authentication and the fingerprint data matching occurs inside the hardware. The design is entirely coded in Verilog HDL. The operations of fingerprint matching, storing of votes and displaying of results are carried out by using various modules. After the design synthesis on the practical device only authenticated user can vote. No duplicate entries are allowed thus all the data is saved perfectly. The voter registration procedure was confirmed to have correct response and stable output at the display unit. As a result, the design has proven to function reliably as a tamper resistant voting machine. Moreover, the findings reveal the implementation of FPGAs.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的新型安全电子投票系统的设计与实现——采用指纹认证
abstract_zh: 基于Zynq-7000 FPGA的硬件指纹认证电子投票机（EVM）的设计与实现。该系统的设计目标是实现投票过程中的安全性与透明性，同时具备快速、可靠的运行性能。众所周知，市场上存在多种电子投票机，但其身份认证方式多为人工操作或不够严格，由此引发诸如重复投票和非法投票等一系列问题。为解决上述问题，本设计在FPGA设备上实现了生物特征认证功能。FPGA的块RAM在将指纹数据转换为二进制比特流后，将其以.mem文件形式存储，从而实现芯片内部的认证，且指纹匹配过程完全在硬件中完成。整个设计采用Verilog HDL语言进行编码，通过多个模块协同完成指纹匹配、选票存储及结果显示等操作。在实际器件上完成设计综合后，仅经认证的用户才能进行投票，杜绝重复投票，确保所有数据完整无误地保存。选民注册流程经过验证，显示单元能够正确响应并稳定输出。结果表明，该设计可作为一款防篡改的可靠电子投票机运行。此外，研究还揭示了FPGA在该应用中的有效实现。

title: A Network Vulnerability Classification Method Based on CVSS
authors: Yizhou Wang
publish: 2025 IEEE 4th International Conference of Safe Production and Informatization (IICSPI)
abstract: In the field of information security, vulnerability assessment, classification, and management constitute core tasks for cybersecurity. Traditional vulnerability scoring and classification methods rely on manual analysis and expert review. This paper proposes an automated vulnerability assessment methodology based on large natural language processing models, which leverages deep learning techniques to achieve intelligent evaluation of the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS). Compared to traditional expert–driven evaluation approaches, this method efficiently parses massive security text data through natural language processing. Specifically, the research innovatively integrates stemming and lemmatization techniques to significantly enhance the model's semantic comprehension of vulnerability description features. Experimental results demonstrate the model's superior assessment performance in cross–dataset tests, validating the effectiveness of deep learning-based automated vulnerability assessment approaches. Experimental results indicate that this model achieves a maximum F1 Score of 96.2% on vulnerability datasets, best reducing error by 12.94% compared to the traditional classification model.
title_zh: 基于CVSS的网络漏洞分类方法
abstract_zh: 在信息安全领域，漏洞评估、分类与管理构成了网络安全的核心任务。传统的漏洞评分与分类方法依赖于人工分析和专家评审。本文提出了一种基于大规模自然语言处理模型的自动化漏洞评估方法，利用深度学习技术实现对通用漏洞评分系统（CVSS）的智能评估。相较于传统的专家驱动型评估方法，该方法通过自然语言处理技术高效解析海量安全文本数据。具体而言，本研究创新性地融合了词干提取（stemming）与词形还原（lemmatization）技术，显著提升了模型对漏洞描述特征的语义理解能力。实验结果表明，该模型在跨数据集测试中表现出卓越的评估性能，验证了基于深度学习的自动化漏洞评估方法的有效性。实验数据显示，该模型在漏洞数据集上的最大F1得分为96.2%，相比传统分类模型，错误率最低降低了12.94%。
